touches.ai_summary: Ava Johnson submitted an inbound request expressing interest in improving pipeline visibility for their marketing agency's sales operations. Initial contact established.
next_steps: Rep to follow up with qualification email

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent follow-up email introducing platform capabilities and requesting time to discuss CrimsonPartners' current pipeline challenges. Ava responded positively, confirming availability.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with HubSpot?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native HubSpot integration with bi-directional sync

next_steps: Schedule qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Rep shared case study of similar mid-market marketing agency achieving 40% improvement in forecast accuracy. Ava confirmed interest in scheduling a qualification call.
next_steps: Qualification call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute qualification call with Ava to understand current state. CrimsonPartners using spreadsheets for pipeline tracking, leading to inconsistent forecasting. Team of ~30 in sales/CS roles. Ava mentioned budget approved for Q2 tooling investments.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for tracking pipeline health?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual updates in spreadsheets, which get outdated quickly

questions_asked.question: How many people would need access to the system?
questions_asked.answer: Probably 25-30 across sales, CS, and leadership

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to deep-dive on use cases
Rep to send product overview deck

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute discovery call focused on pain points. Ava described challenges with visibility into deal progression and difficulty identifying at-risk accounts. Expressed particular interest in automation capabilities to reduce manual data entry.

questions_asked.question: Can your system automatically pull in meeting notes and email activity?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we capture all touchpoints automatically via calendar and email integration

questions_asked.question: What metrics matter most to your leadership team?
questions_asked.answer: Close rate, sales cycle length, and forecast accuracy

next_steps: Follow-up call to discuss implementation timeline
Ava to identify technical point person

touches.ai_summary: 20-minute follow-up call to discuss implementation approach. Ava confirmed Evelyn Hall from RevOps would handle technical evaluation. Discussed phased rollout starting with sales team, then expanding to CS.

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal timeline for going live?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to launch by end of Q2, early Q3 at latest

questions_asked.question: What kind of onboarding support do you provide?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated implementation manager, plus training sessions for admins and end users

objections: Ava mentioned concern about team adoption given past failed tool rollouts
next_steps: Schedule another discovery session
Connect Evelyn Hall for technical discussion

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute discovery call diving into specific automation needs. Ava walked through current workflow gaps and explained how reps often forget to log activities. Discussed consulting services to help with process optimization.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer consulting to help redesign our sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our professional services team can help map your workflows and configure the platform

questions_asked.question: Are there other stakeholders we should involve in the evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO Sebastian likes to weigh in on significant investments, and Willow manages the sales team day-to-day

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Evelyn
Prepare demo focused on automation and analytics

touches.ai_summary: Rep sent email recapping discovery findings and confirming next steps. Shared agenda for upcoming technical eval and demo. Ava acknowledged and confirmed Evelyn's availability.
next_steps: Technical evaluation scheduled
Product demo scheduled

touches.ai_summary: 58-minute technical evaluation with Evelyn Hall covering data security, integrations, API capabilities, and admin controls. Evelyn asked detailed questions about HubSpot sync, user permissions, and data retention policies. Generally satisfied with technical capabilities but flagged questions about custom reporting.

questions_asked.question: How granular are the permission controls for different user roles?
questions_asked.answer: Role-based access control down to field level, with custom role creation available

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and can we export everything?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited retention, full data export available anytime via API or UI

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom dashboards or are we limited to templates?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable dashboards with drag-and-drop builder, plus SQL access for advanced users

objections: Evelyn expressed concern about complexity of initial setup and learning curve for admins
next_steps: Evelyn to review documentation and test environment
Follow up on custom reporting requirements

touches.ai_summary: 41-minute product demo with Ava focusing on pipeline visibility dashboards, automation workflows, and forecasting features. Walked through real scenarios matching CrimsonPartners' use cases. Ava engaged positively, asking about specific configurations.

questions_asked.question: Can we set up automated alerts for deals that haven't had activity in X days?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully configurable activity-based triggers and escalations

questions_asked.question: Which features are most exciting for your team?
questions_asked.answer: The automated activity capture and the predictive deal scoring stand out

next_steps: Schedule follow-up demo for Willow and sales team
Begin drafting proposal

touches.ai_summary: 46-minute demo rescheduled from earlier date. Presented to broader group including Willow Lee. Demonstrated end-user workflows, mobile app, and reporting capabilities. Willow asked practical questions about daily rep usage. Meeting ran long due to detailed Q&A.

questions_asked.question: How much time does this actually save reps each day?
questions_asked.answer: Customers report 30-45 minutes saved daily on admin tasks

questions_asked.question: What if reps don't adopt it? Do we have usage visibility?
questions_asked.answer: Admin dashboard shows adoption metrics and we provide change management best practices

questions_asked.question: Any concerns from the team about switching tools?
questions_asked.answer: Willow mentioned the team is stretched thin, so ease of use is critical

objections: Willow concerned about disruption during busy Q2 period
next_steps: Share proposal with pricing options
Schedule call with Sebastian for executive alignment

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute proposal review call with Ava. Presented three tiers, recommended automations_plus_consulting package given their process optimization needs. Discussed 28 seats covering sales, CS, and leadership. Ava responded positively but mentioned need for budget approval from Sebastian.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package versus just the platform?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting includes process audit, workflow design, custom configuration, and 3 months of optimization support

questions_asked.question: Does the pricing fit within your approved budget range?
questions_asked.answer: It's at the higher end, but I think we can make the case given the ROI

next_steps: Schedule meeting with Sebastian to present business case
Ava to socialize proposal internally

touches.ai_summary: 39-minute executive meeting with Sebastian Lee and Ava Johnson. Presented ROI analysis and strategic value of pipeline visibility improvements. Sebastian asked pointed questions about implementation risk, time to value, and competitive alternatives. Showed strong interest but indicated final decision would come after internal discussion.

questions_asked.question: What's the realistic timeline to seeing measurable improvement in forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see 20-30% improvement within 60-90 days of launch

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to other platforms in this space?
questions_asked.answer: We're positioned as premium but include automation and consulting that others charge separately for

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Sebastian said proof of quick adoption and clear ROI within first quarter

objections: Sebastian questioned whether the full consulting package is necessary or if they could start smaller
next_steps: Sebastian to discuss with finance and ops team
Rep to follow up next week

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute negotiation call, rescheduled from previous week. Ava indicated Sebastian supportive but pushing back on price. Requested options to reduce cost while maintaining core functionality. Discussed potential to adjust seat count or consulting scope.

questions_asked.question: Could we start with fewer seats and add more later?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure as 20 seats initially with quarterly true-up option

questions_asked.question: What's the main concern—total budget or timing of payment?
questions_asked.answer: Total budget is the issue; we're trying to stay under $20K annually

objections: Ava mentioned Sebastian comparing to a lower-cost competitor option
next_steps: Rep to prepare revised proposal with pricing options
Ava to clarify must-have vs nice-to-have features

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute negotiation call to review revised proposal options. Presented scenario with 28 seats but reduced consulting hours, bringing ACV to $18,700. Ava receptive and believed this would work within budget constraints. Discussed payment terms and contract length.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on payment terms or can we do quarterly billing?
questions_asked.answer: Annual pre-pay is standard, but we can discuss quarterly with a small upcharge

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing structure work for your team?
questions_asked.answer: This feels much more manageable; I think Sebastian will approve

next_steps: Ava to get final sign-off from Sebastian
Schedule pricing finalization call

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute pricing call to confirm final details. Ava requested additional discount to get under $18K threshold. Rep explained limited flexibility but offered to include extra onboarding session as added value. Ava agreed to take current proposal to Sebastian for decision.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to move on price to get us under $18K?
questions_asked.answer: I'm at my floor on discount, but I can add two extra training sessions for your team

objections: Ava pushed for deeper discount to match internal budget target
next_steps: Ava to present final offer to Sebastian
Decision expected within 48 hours

touches.ai_summary: 25-minute final pricing call with Ava. Sebastian approved the $18,700 proposal with 28 seats and reduced consulting scope. Discussed contract terms, implementation kickoff timeline, and onboarding schedule. Ava confirmed legal review should take 3-5 days, targeting contract signature by end of week.

questions_asked.question: When can we realistically start the implementation after contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within one week of signed contract, sooner if your team is ready

questions_asked.question: Any remaining concerns or blockers on your end?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're aligned; just need to get through legal review

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to add seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Simple amendment process, prorated pricing for remainder of term

next_steps: Send final contract for legal review
Schedule implementation kickoff meeting
Ava to coordinate with Evelyn on technical prep
